name: Koren Saida
goals: Crush the Alpine Loop (40 miles, 4200 ft elevation gain) — Utah classic
Dominate Emigration Canyon climbs in SLC
Build power-to-weight for sustained 2-hour uphill efforts
Be fast and efficient on long climbs at 6-7% gradient

target_events.name: Alpine Loop
target_events.location: Provo Canyon / American Fork Canyon, Utah
target_events.key_segment: Sundance to Cascade Springs — 8.5 miles at 6% avg
